name: io.github.liguelead/mcp-server
description: MCP Server for sending SMS, SMS Flash, and voice calls in Brazil via LigueLead API. Enables Claude, Cursor, and AI agents to send real communications — BRL pricing, PIX payments, PT-BR support.
title: LigueLead

environmentVariables.name: LIGUELEAD_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: API token from LigueLead dashboard (areadocliente.liguelead.app.br → Integrações → API Token)

environmentVariables.name: TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Transport type: 'stdio' for local clients, 'http' for remote server
